parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id::text AS prediction_id,
  p.match_id::text,
  p.prediction_type::text,
  p.home_win_prob,
  p.draw_prob,
  p.away_win_prob,
  p.predicted_home::integer,
  p.predicted_away::integer,
  p.confidence,
  m.home_score AS actual_home,
  m.away_score AS actual_away,
  m.status,
  CASE
    WHEN m.winner_team_id = m.home_team_id THEN 'home'
    WHEN m.winner_team_id IS NULL AND m.status = 'finished' THEN 'draw'
    WHEN m.winner_team_id = m.away_team_id THEN 'away'
  END AS actual_outcome,
  m.home_team_id::text,
  m.away_team_id::text,
  m.stage::text,
  ht.name AS home_team_name,
  at.name AS away_team_name,
  DATE(m.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') AS match_date
FROM wcic.predictions p
JOIN wcic.matches m ON m.id = p.match_id
JOIN wcic.teams ht ON ht.id = m.home_team_id
JOIN wcic.teams at ON at.id = m.away_team_id
WHERE m.status = 'finished'
  AND p.was_correct IS NULL
  AND p.prediction_type = 'pre_match'
  AND m.home_score IS NOT NULL
  AND m.away_score IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY m.finished_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

INSERT INTO wcic.workflow_logs (execution_id, workflow_name, status, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, trigger_type, correlation_id, items_processed, output_summary) VALUES ($1, 'WF-11-prediction-accuracy-tracker', 'success', $2::timestamptz, NOW(), EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW()-$2::timestamptz))*1000, 'cron', $3::uuid, 0, '{"reason":"no_pending_evaluations"}'::jsonb);

UPDATE wcic.predictions SET
  actual_outcome     = $2,
  was_correct        = $3,
  brier_score        = $4::numeric,
  accuracy_score     = $5::numeric,
  actual_home_score  = $6::smallint,
  actual_away_score  = $7::smallint
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id::text, was_correct, brier_score;

INSERT INTO wcic.prediction_accuracy (
  period_type, period_label, prediction_type,
  total_predictions, correct_predictions,
  accuracy_pct, avg_confidence, brier_score_avg, team_id
)
SELECT
  'daily',
  $1::text,
  'pre_match',
  COUNT(*),
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE was_correct = true),
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE was_correct = true) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1),
  ROUND(AVG(confidence)::numeric, 2),
  ROUND(AVG(brier_score)::numeric, 4),
  NULL
FROM wcic.predictions p
JOIN wcic.matches m ON m.id = p.match_id
WHERE DATE(m.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') = $1::date
  AND p.was_correct IS NOT NULL
  AND p.prediction_type = 'pre_match'
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT prediction_accuracy_unique
DO UPDATE SET
  total_predictions   = EXCLUDED.total_predictions,
  correct_predictions = EXCLUDED.correct_predictions,
  accuracy_pct        = EXCLUDED.accuracy_pct,
  avg_confidence      = EXCLUDED.avg_confidence,
  brier_score_avg     = EXCLUDED.brier_score_avg,
  calculated_at       = NOW();

INSERT INTO wcic.prediction_accuracy (
  period_type, period_label, prediction_type,
  total_predictions, correct_predictions,
  accuracy_pct, avg_confidence, brier_score_avg, team_id
)
SELECT
  'stage',
  m.stage::text,
  'pre_match',
  COUNT(*),
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.was_correct = true),
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.was_correct = true) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1),
  ROUND(AVG(p.confidence)::numeric, 2),
  ROUND(AVG(p.brier_score)::numeric, 4),
  NULL
FROM wcic.predictions p
JOIN wcic.matches m ON m.id = p.match_id
WHERE m.stage::text = $1
  AND p.was_correct IS NOT NULL
  AND p.prediction_type = 'pre_match'
GROUP BY m.stage
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT prediction_accuracy_unique
DO UPDATE SET
  total_predictions   = EXCLUDED.total_predictions,
  correct_predictions = EXCLUDED.correct_predictions,
  accuracy_pct        = EXCLUDED.accuracy_pct,
  avg_confidence      = EXCLUDED.avg_confidence,
  brier_score_avg     = EXCLUDED.brier_score_avg,
  calculated_at       = NOW();

INSERT INTO wcic.prediction_accuracy (
  period_type, period_label, prediction_type,
  total_predictions, correct_predictions,
  accuracy_pct, avg_confidence, brier_score_avg, team_id
)
SELECT
  'team',
  $1::text,
  'pre_match',
  COUNT(*),
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.was_correct = true),
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.was_correct = true) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1),
  ROUND(AVG(p.confidence)::numeric, 2),
  ROUND(AVG(p.brier_score)::numeric, 4),
  $2::uuid
FROM wcic.predictions p
JOIN wcic.matches m ON m.id = p.match_id
WHERE (m.home_team_id = $2::uuid OR m.away_team_id = $2::uuid)
  AND p.was_correct IS NOT NULL
  AND p.prediction_type = 'pre_match'
GROUP BY $2::uuid
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT prediction_accuracy_unique
DO UPDATE SET
  total_predictions   = EXCLUDED.total_predictions,
  correct_predictions = EXCLUDED.correct_predictions,
  accuracy_pct        = EXCLUDED.accuracy_pct,
  avg_confidence      = EXCLUDED.avg_confidence,
  brier_score_avg     = EXCLUDED.brier_score_avg,
  calculated_at       = NOW();

INSERT INTO wcic.prediction_accuracy (
  period_type, period_label, prediction_type,
  total_predictions, correct_predictions,
  accuracy_pct, avg_confidence, brier_score_avg, team_id
)
SELECT
  'team',
  $1::text,
  'pre_match',
  COUNT(*),
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.was_correct = true),
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.was_correct = true) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1),
  ROUND(AVG(p.confidence)::numeric, 2),
  ROUND(AVG(p.brier_score)::numeric, 4),
  $2::uuid
FROM wcic.predictions p
JOIN wcic.matches m ON m.id = p.match_id
WHERE (m.home_team_id = $2::uuid OR m.away_team_id = $2::uuid)
  AND p.was_correct IS NOT NULL
  AND p.prediction_type = 'pre_match'
GROUP BY $2::uuid
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT prediction_accuracy_unique
DO UPDATE SET
  total_predictions   = EXCLUDED.total_predictions,
  correct_predictions = EXCLUDED.correct_predictions,
  accuracy_pct        = EXCLUDED.accuracy_pct,
  avg_confidence      = EXCLUDED.avg_confidence,
  brier_score_avg     = EXCLUDED.brier_score_avg,
  calculated_at       = NOW();

parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ updated_at: new Date().toISOString(), match_id: $('Calculate Accuracy Metrics').item.json.match_id }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO wcic.workflow_logs (execution_id, workflow_name, status, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, trigger_type, correlation_id, items_processed, output_summary) VALUES ($1, 'WF-11-prediction-accuracy-tracker', 'success', $2::timestamptz, NOW(), EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW()-$2::timestamptz))*1000, 'cron', $3::uuid, 1, $4::jsonb);

additionalFields.queryParams: ={{ [$('Init').first().json.executionId, $('Init').first().json.startedAt, $('Init').first().json.correlationId, JSON.stringify({ prediction_id: $('Calculate Accuracy Metrics').item.json.prediction_id, was_correct: $('Calculate Accuracy Metrics').item.json.was_correct, brier_score: $('Calculate Accuracy Metrics').item.json.brier_score })] }}
